task_completion.description: Verify that the payment amount entered is exactly $30.00.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the OpenEMR graphical user interface via a web browser.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use direct database commands to insert the payment.

integrity.description: Verify that the data was entered into the actual application fields.
